creator: av@silverwraith.com
text:
When you make install in /usr/ports/security/saint , the /usr/ports/security/saint/work/config directory isn't copied to /usr/local/saint .  As a result SAINT refuses to start.

Fix: 

unknown (basically, /usr/ports/security/saint/work/config needs to be copied)
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd to /usr/ports/security/saint and  make install
